TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Melukux ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 43 buwan, 114 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 108 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, saySiyat 1%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an maki qu ngasal bziran. tay 'llaw na Melukux hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Melukux hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Melukux hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Melukux hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Melukux hya' ga Spwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ melukux ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. taj ʔllaw na melukux ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na melukux ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na melukux ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na melukux ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na melukux ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕpwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Melukux ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Nahuy go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 43 buwan, 114 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 95% kyan ku 108 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 5% kyan ku 6 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 90%, saySiyat 1%, Truku 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. rhzyal kki'an maki qu ngasal bziran. tay 'llaw na Melukux hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Melukux hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Melukux hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Melukux hya' ga rgyax. tay mkraya' na Melukux hya' ga Spwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ melukux ɣa nija mki s~ɕku s~ɕinʦ~ʨik keŋ atu naħuj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, s~ɕajs~ɕijat *%, truku *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. taj ʔllaw na melukux ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na melukux ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na melukux ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na melukux ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkrajaʔ na melukux ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕpwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
